narrative:
Jackson Twp & Broughton (precinct in Paulding County) has 667 registered voters, with 45.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.8 percentage points.
